title: PM Domain Local Staging Execution And Validation
objective: Execute the completed packet-007 PM/work SQL bundle against the local PostgreSQL staging database, validate the result against the approved runbook and validation plan, and produce the first execution-backed PM validation handoff.
constrained_outputs: Execution-backed validation handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
SQL corrections only if validation reveals defects inside c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/infra/database/migrations/work/
Explicit pass/fail/blocked status for each validation stage
No legacy migration, no runtime adoption work, no schema redesign
validation_steps: Confirm the local staging database is reachable before execution begins
Confirm packet-007 SQL files execute in strict manifest order
Confirm structural fidelity, constraint integrity, contract behavior, and governance compliance are tested with real execution evidence
Confirm all deferred cross-domain dependencies remain explicit and are not silently implemented
Confirm any SQL fixes are followed by a clean rebuild rather than manual database patching
sql_permission_note: SQL fixes are allowed only if local validation reveals defects in the packet-007 bundle. SQL scope remains limited to the shared-infra PM/work lane.
